mapper.select: SELECT wr.id, wr.title, wr.report_type, wr.template_id, wr.user_id, wr.report_date, wr.week_number, wr.month_number, wr.content, wr.work_summary, wr.work_plan, wr.issues, wr.status, wr.submit_time, wr.create_time, u.nick_name, d.dept_name AS deptName, rt.template_name FROM tb_work_report wr LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON wr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_department d ON u.department_id = d.id AND d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_report_template rt ON wr.template_id = rt.id AND rt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE wr.is_deleted = 0 AND wr.id = #{id}
